the live selling model just to be completely honest and eBay knows this. We've had this conversation with them like it does not fit our traditional model and the way we operate. But at the same time, when you look at just like the macroeconomics of all marketplaces, not just collectibles, like live selling is accelerating so fast and growing so much, it would be professionally irresponsible of me to not say, "Hey, we got to go try this out. We got to learn what works. We got to find the right ways to do it." And so, you know, our first live stream, I made a ton of mistakes. Like, we didn't put the listings up until the day of.
